name: Anne BEGHIN's Post - Digitalized organoids - LinkedIn
snippet: We developed an integrated pipeline to digitally dissect organoids in 3D. These are not just 3D images, but interactive, data-rich reconstructions.

name: Digitalized organoids: integrated pipeline for high-speed 3D analysis
snippet:
Nature Methods. Digitalized organoids: integrated pipeline for high-speed 3D analysis of organoid structures using multilevel segmentation and cellular topology.
In this study, we introduce an AI-based multilevel segmentation and cellular topology pipeline for screening morphology and topology modifications in 3D cell culture at both the nuclear and cytoplasmic levels, as well as at the whole-organoid scale.

name: Digitalized organoids: integrated pipeline for 3D high-speed analysis
